title: American Hero
description: Tune in to see which superhero can prove themselves worthy of joining The Seven.
quote: Please hang up your capes and go.
altHero: dramatically lit stage with Homelander, Starlight, and Supersonic
alt2: two contestants, a hijab-wearing female superhero, and a Black female superhero
alt3: Homelander with The Deep who is re-joining The Seven
alt4: Homelander with his arm around Starlight’s shoulder and he is grinning at the camera
